case_title: DEBRA HABER COURT APPOINTED RECEIVER FOR vs. DE OLIVEIRA, ANTONIO et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEBRA HABER COURT APPOINTED RECEIVER FOR THE DOLAN TRUST-JOHN DOLAN SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE AS TO DEFENDANT DE OLIVEIRA, ANTONIO DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
